item.dc:creator: deafkitten

item.title: Whelp I shot my shot.
item.description:
Context: I just thought she was cute had never met her and had not chatted with her before handing her the note. She had some cool tattoos.
Fun roller coaster of emotion today! It was a nice confidence boost for me as well! It didn't work out this time due to the age gap. But that doesn't mean it never will! If you like someone you should say something! Get out there and shoot your shot!
item.dc:creator: SomeSkepticalDude

item.title: The two basic types of "Christian"
item.description: I know this post may get downvoted into oblivion, but I like this Christian litmus test. Let's us not forget others like Dolly Parton ... Jimmy Carter, Fred Rogers, etc. These people don't feel the need to tell people they are Christian. They have no need to remind people of their faith. Their actions show it every day. Dolly's Imagination Library: https://imaginationlibrary.com/check-availability/?gclid=EAIaIQobChMIwc-P2s76hgMVEWdHAR18Ogy2EAAYASAAEgIZj_D_BwE Image courtesy of @goodgodabove
item.dc:creator: TheBeatingOfHisHideousHeart

item.title: Lucy - Fallout Cosplay
item.description:
I love Lucy! Here is my Fallout Cosplay - me as Lucy MacLean from the series. I got so many requests to do this cosplay once this series came out, so I had to do it! Plus, it was a good excuse to finally do a vault dweller look, something I have wanted to do forever. Hope you enjoy!
Reference Character (Show is pretty fun to check out if you haven't yet!)
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Made another curvy thing.
item.description:
Radiused banquette for a beach house in Delaware. Three drawers below seat flanked by two cylindrical cabinets. Walnut and matching walnut veneers running horizontally. Transioning from concave to convex. Lots of fun.
Drawer case, seat, seat back, plinth bases, drawer front forms and cylindrical cabinet form made with CNC.
Sorry for the selfie.
The grandpa of all forms. Core (3/8”, 1/8” barrel cut banding ply) and walnut veneers laminated with west system epoxy using metal band clamps. Formica faced call with several layers of 3/8” bending ply outside.
Finished product at night.
item.dc:creator: oldselmersaxguy1

item.title: Doctors know that when they hear a patient say “this is the worst headache of my life!” It’s time for an emergency brain scan.
item.description:
This is a little PSA involving an uncommon event known as a “thunderclap headache.” A thunderclap headache is called such because it comes on suddenly, and intensifies within 60 seconds. The actual headache lasts longer than five minutes, and it is EXCEEDINGLY PAINFUL. It feels like you’ve been struck with lightning. Patients often describe it as “the worst headache of my life.” In fact, patients have used this phrase so much that a legitimate symptom of a thunderclap is saying “the worst headache of my life.” Thunderclap headaches are *often* a result of bleeding and swelling in or around the brain. Sometimes it really is just a random headache, but you can’t know that until you talk to a doctor. If it’s a result of bleeding, it is NOT going to get better until you have immediate medical attention. In fact, it will get WORSE.
This is a less blurry version of the first image (link found in sources cited). Some people might write a thunderclap headache off as a migraine, especially those with chronic migraines. However, a thunderclap headache is different. Fortunately, I found a table that explains the differences.
Source: https://migraineprofessional.com/thunderclap-headaches-vs-migraines/
You don’t want to fuck around with a brain bleed or injury. The longer it goes on, the higher the risk of the damages becoming more severe and permanent.
The table in the first image is from the Advanced Headache Center: https://www.advancedheadachecenter.com/what-are-thunderclap-headaches I also took a look at this page, but it’s filled with A LOT of dense medical language: https://practicalneurology.com/articles/2023-may-june/headaches-not-to-miss-regardless-of-the-patient-population-thunderclap-headache-in-the-emergency-department Harvard Health Publishing - Note that I could only read the first few paragraphs before I hit a paywall: https://www.health.harvard.edu/diseases-and-conditions/the-worst-headache-of-your-life
item.dc:creator: OlivetheNerd

item.title: My last manager was a jerk. New one made my day. :)
item.description: To clarify— I asked for the body-doubling and it made my work significantly easier. Obviously not everyone wants to be on zoom with their manager while they work. It was really helpful for me.

item.title: MRW my buddy repeatedly turned down the sexual advances of a smoking hot chick in a bar because she was drunk off her ass.
item.dc:creator: Lassannn

item.title: As a 280 lb man who does manly things like shoot guns and go off roading, I just want to say that I'd wear the ever loving shit out of this dress
item.description: Man, I just wanna be pretty, pride is one of my favorite times of year because it means I can wear all kinds of colorful clothes and pins without work getting pissy with me for dress code issues. Fp edit: I've gotten more comments saying "you won't fit into that dress" than homo/transphobic comments. I fuckin love this community. I'm pretty sure this dress is meant for someone with a size 0 waist, so there's no way in hell it'd fit me. Also it's probably AI generated, and also made for someone with stilts on. (originally posted by @NotaScientologist on 2023-06-28 04:36:01)
item.dc:creator: ThisTimeLastYear

item.title: Sitting vigil
item.description:
I posted some pictures of him a few days ago when he started his final journey. I'm amazed he's still here, but he's got 3 paws on the Bridge. As long as he's not in pain, not suffering, we're just sitting with him and keeping him comfortable. If he does start to show signs of hurting, we'll figure out a way to pay his toll. He was a shelter rescue at 16, 22 now. I won't take him back to the shelter for euth because he wouldn't understand and would think he was being abandoned again. My heart is breaking in slow motion. Extra front page edit: Such an outpouring of love! The best weirdos in the world hang out here.
Willis tax. Front page edit: I've been telling Willis how much Imgur loves him. Thank you, lovely people. I ask that new commentors please refrain from telling me about how his vet could make a house call. If it's a story about your experience, please do, that's awesome. But if it's just advice, it's not helping to repeat it. Thank you.

item.dc:creator: PiercedViking

item.title: Ernest vs the Killer Klowns
item.description: Pretty cool fact, both of these movies scared the shit out of me as a child. Ernest was one of my heroes. He could take the most difficult and scary of situations in stride and still find humor in it. Thinking back on it now I think that laid the groundwork for humor being a major coping mechanism in my life. I remember watching all of his movies on VHS. I forgot to return one of them for like 2 weeks and it cost me my allowance for a month in late fees lol
item.dc:creator: Sensiblyinteresting

item.title: Images of Note: My internet is shit
item.description:
Give me Kronk Anakin.
Jeremy Cunt is why I fucking hate people in authority talking about shit they don't know about. http://twitch.tv/abbiistabbii
Do it. Do it.
When I have a moment I usually watch cab view videos or plane accident videos.
This is the best thing I have ever seen.
"AI will solve everything" The AI:
This is the gayest thing I have seen today
My mum when I was 6
Something tells me this has happened before.
I still think about flowers for Algernon.
I need to write this in all caps: MEMBERS OF THE BRITISH GOVERNMENT ARE OPENLY ADVOCATING FOR CONVERSION THERAPY FOR TRANSGENDER PEOPLE, INCLUDING A CERTAIN LESBIAN MSP! FUCK. CONVERSION. THERAPY.
HELL YEAH WOMEN 2 JUST DROPPED
As a former cashier, I wish I could've done this.
This is my favourite video ever.
I AM GOING TO COMMIT VARIOUS UNFORGIVABLE WARCRIMES
byeh
http://discord.abbii.gay: For Chats http://twitch.abbii.gay: For Stream (m/w/f around 1830 UK time) http://tumblr.abbii.gay: For shitposts http://mastodon.abbii.gay: For microblogging
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: "max and his floofs"
item.description:
1.... (sound) Max is a rescue kitty with unusual fur fluffs growing behind his ears
2..... (loud sound) Max as a baby
3..... (sound) Max loves sitting outside during rainstorms
4..... Max fighting with a roommate He's a healthy normal cat. But even Jackson Galaxy had never seen anything like Max's fur floofs before.
(sound) Max being mystical source: He is on social media as Max And His Floofs

2

5. Smart boiii
6. Life with a dog be like
7. Le Fancy dog
8
9
10. Birds dance
11. This kid got a 100 dollars for his birthday (kind of)
12
13
14. A very chill goat
15. Hello friendos, for the past year and a half, I’ve been working on a game that’s very close to my heart. "Do Not Press The Button (To Delete The Multiverse)" is a quirky adventure crafted with love and passion, with my brother by my side, helping every step of the way. It was inspired by games like The Stanley Parable. As indie developers, we rely on your support to bring our game to life. By adding it to your wishlist, you’re helping us reach more players and make a big impact in the gaming community. https://store.steampowered.com/app/2336120/Do_Not_Press_The_Button_To_Delete_The_Multiverse/ We can’t do this without you! Thank you for supporting our dream and helping us share our wild adventure with the world!

item.dc:creator: AdamMackwoodart

item.title: Spent 2 Years Painting this Overly Canadian Portrait of Ryan Reynolds & We’re Trying to Get Him to See it!
item.description: Introducing the “Ryan Reynolds Canadian Essentials” Portrait! This took 2 years to paint & we’re hoping Ryan Reynolds can see it because we’re selling prints of it for charity to raise as much as we can for our local Humane Society! It’s a really Canadian portrait just in time for Canada Day & the great release of Deadpool in a month! Can you help us share/boost so Ryan can see?! #ryanreynolds #canada #canada_day #art #deadpool #portrait #painting
item.dc:creator: LittleLo
